title: DependencyRadar
intent: Dependency inventory, CVE detection, and remediation orchestration
requirements: inventory module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
scans module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
vulnerabilities module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
upgrades module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
exceptions module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
analytics module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
